title: Immersive Snowy Leaves (Bushy Leaves)
body:
# **Immersive Snowy Leaves (Bushy Leaves)**
![Leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/676dc7ed6649bc6273ed677f04cdb5b7459b4d05.png)

This is a continuation of this project "[Snow Side Texture](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/snow-side-texture)"

### **So what is this?**
as said above,
This is an addition to my previous project.

So this is support from the "Snow Side Texture" project specifically for bushy leaves.

Note: This resource pack requires the [Fusion](https://modrinth.com/mod/fusion-connected-textures).

 

Important!

This pack can be used without the previous pack.

However, if you use them together, you will now need "[Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts)" 

Then, in the "Snow Side Texture" resource pack settings, disable the "Snow Texture On Leaves" option.
Then, place the "Immersive Snowy Leaves" pack above it.

![Tutorial](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/531eea3a2b4707a4da67f17468fff94a3ef3f806.png)

_I suggest using the season mod,_
_for example :_
_[Fabric Seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-seasons) ,_
_[Serene Seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/serene-seasons)_
